sources.title: City of Adelaide bin collection day checker
sources.message: Bin collection days depend on the property address.

sources.title: City of Adelaide bin requests and issues
sources.message: For missed, damaged, lost, or stolen bins, use the City of Adelaide bin requests and issues guidance.

sources.title: City of Adelaide hard waste collection for residents
sources.message: Hard waste guidance should be confirmed through the City of Adelaide hard waste collection page.

sources.title: City of Adelaide Which Bin guidance
sources.message: For item disposal questions, use City of Adelaide recycling guidance and Which Bin SA where linked.

sources.title: Which Bin SA
sources.message: Which Bin SA can help identify the correct disposal stream for common items.
